description: Sync Microsoft Power BI dashboards, reports, and datasets into the Shielva knowledge base via the Power BI REST API v1.0.

install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview → Application (client) ID

install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets → Client secrets

install_fields.label: Azure Tenant ID
install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → Overview → Tenant ID

apis.name: List Dashboards
apis.description: Return raw dashboard records from the Power BI REST API.

apis.description: Return raw report records from the Power BI REST API.

apis.description: Return raw dataset records from the Power BI REST API.

apis.description: Return raw workspace (group) records from the Power BI REST API.
